zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Swillington III是Adam de Swillington的兒子，於1341年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾維爾。他於1360年與Lady Margaret Belers在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾維爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1391年7月11日在英國英格蘭素福爾可布萊斯賀包享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Swillington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Shilvington in Morpeth (Northumberland). The placename probably means something like ‘the farmstead of the people who live at the ledge’, from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + the groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
perhaps a habitational name from Shitlington (Yorkshire), from an Old English personal name Scyt(t)el + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Swillington III was born in 1341, in Well, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Adam de Swillington. He married Lady Margaret Belers in 1360, in Well, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 11 July 1391, in Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Swillington IIIは1341年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウエルでAdam de Swillingtonの息子として生まれた。1360年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウエルでLady Margaret Belersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1391年7月11日にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリスブルグで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Swillington III(은)는 1341년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 웰에서 Adam de Swillington의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 웰에서 Lady Margaret Belers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1391년 7월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 블리스버그h에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Swillington III родился в 1341 г. в местности велл, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Adam de Swillington. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Belers в 1360 г. в местности велл, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 11 июля 1391 г. в местности блитбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
